consensus_summary: The On Running Cloudstratus 'Mineral Rust' is a budget-friendly lifestyle/casual shoe that delivers solid comfort and aesthetic appeal for the price point. Wearers appreciate its CloudTec cushioning and versatile colorway, though some note it lacks the performance features of higher-end On models. The shoe performs adequately for light casual wear but isn't designed for serious athletic use.
pros: Lightweight and easy to wear all day
cons: Limited arch support for longer wear
Outsole wears quickly with regular use
Not suitable for running or sports
